# Paste-vlv v1.2.0

## Highlights

- Reworked history cards with a Paste-inspired visual system, source-app identity, grouped-item accents, URL previews, and richer file/image presentation.
- Added better history organization: pinboard chips can be reordered, grouped items stay available in their groups, and history deletion can hide grouped items without destroying them.
- Selecting or pasting an older item now moves it back to the top of the general history instead of leaving it buried.
- Improved grouped-item behavior so selected group content can reappear in general history without removing it from the group.

## Distribution

- macOS 13 or later.
- ZIP is ad-hoc signed, not Developer ID signed or notarized. macOS may show a Gatekeeper warning on first launch.
